text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Is this not the day of Saint<n>Valentine?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Were you aware, Trainer? I havebeen wanting to play the part ofthat saint, just once.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day, and T.M.<n>Opera O hits
the ground running... It's<n>something I'm quite
used to already.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado, Happy<n>Valentine's Day,
Trainer! I present<n>you with...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Der Freischütz chocolate magic<n>bullets from the
Opera Chocolate<n>Series!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Within this box are seven small<n>pieces of
bullet-shaped chocolate, six<n>of which carry luck.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The last carries misfortune! Eat it and<n>all hell will
break loose—on your<n>palate!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why? Isn't it obvious? Love burns<n>brightest
against adversity.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Overcoming this difficult trial will<n>surely strengthen
your love for me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't see how this could be<n>enjoyable, but I
can't imagine<n>there's much use in arguing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us begin the Der Freischütz<n>chocolate
tasting extraordinaire!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, choose whichever chocolate<n>you wish and
bite into it with all your<n>spirit!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's no stopping now. I muster up<n>my
courage, pop one in my mouth,<n>and...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: W-well?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Fortune has smiled upon you!<n>You drew a
lucky one right off the bat!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And? How does my homemade<n>chocolate taste?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! But of course it does! That's<n>precisely why I
went through the<n>trouble of making them myself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What a relief. Ahaha... Haha...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I tire of this, Trainer! I ambored!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: We cannot end the play without a<n>climactic scene!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, help yourself to a second. Go on,<n>have
another.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, she might have me eating<n>until I take
the misfortune chocolate,<n>so I try to protest.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, very well. I have a proposition,<n>then. We
each have one in turns.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Whoever eats the misfortunate<n>chocolate loses.
Do we have an<n>accord?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O and I go back and forth eating<n>the
chocolates.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Munch, chew, chew...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yet another lucky chocolate for<n>me! Heh... This
tension is enthralling.<n>Your turn now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Have you something to say?
choice_data_list:
These are Russian roulette chocolates, aren't
they?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Russian roulette? I already told you,<n>these are
chocolate magic bullets<n>from Der Freischütz.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... Ehh heh heh heh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Bwaa ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Chocolate magic bullets!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, let us continue our undeniable<n>game of
chocolate magic bullets!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's not going to give on<n>the name. The
both of us eat three<n>pieces each.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: W-well?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Daaah! Trainer? TRAAAINER!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I wake up in the infirmary with a<n>stomachache.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Regained consciousness, have you,<n>Trainer? I'm
glad to see you escaped<n>the grips of death.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Very glad... If anything were to<n>become of you, I...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, please rest. I shan't leave<n>your side until
you are right as rain.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Opera O! Please, come out, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Pleeease! I'm lost without you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My word, they are loud.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Fans eagerly awaiting my presence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I canceled all of my events after you<n>took ill.
choice_data_list: Are you sure that was a good idea?
Are you sure that was a good idea?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course. There is nothing in<n>existence more
important to me than<n>you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
How much of that is true, I'm not<n>sure. Even so,
it's easy to see she's<n>worried about me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That was quite a Valentine's Day. But<n>through it,
I've come to understand<n>her feelings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! I just recalled that I brought<n>a get-well
present for you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Feast on this and recover your<n>strength.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Second in the Opera Chocolate Series,<n>the Deluded
Bridegroom!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I refuse with every ounce of my<n>being.
